title: Intermittent DNS Resolution Timeouts

ticket.summary: Users in the Chicago branch report that internal apps (intranet.corp.local, crm.corp.local) intermittently fail to load with 'server not found' errors, roughly 1 in 3 attempts. Public websites load fine. Issue started this morning around 08:00 and is not affecting the New York branch.

topology.description: Chicago branch clients (10.20.1.0/24) are configured via DHCP with two DNS servers: primary dns-chi-01 (10.20.1.10) and secondary dns-chi-02 (10.20.1.11). Both forward internal *.corp.local queries to the corporate DNS server dns-corp-01 (10.0.0.53) over the WAN link to New York. New York branch clients use only dns-nyc-01 (10.10.1.10), which forwards directly to dns-corp-01.

logs.content:
08:02:11 query: crm.corp.local IN A -> forwarding to 10.0.0.53
08:02:11 error: timeout waiting for response from forwarder 10.0.0.53
08:02:41 query: intranet.corp.local IN A -> forwarding to 10.0.0.53
08:02:41 error: timeout waiting for response from forwarder 10.0.0.53
08:03:02 query: crm.corp.local IN A -> forwarding to 10.0.0.53
08:03:02 error: timeout waiting for response from forwarder 10.0.0.53

08:02:05 query: intranet.corp.local IN A -> forwarding to 10.0.0.53
08:02:05 response: 172.16.5.20 (18ms)
08:02:30 query: crm.corp.local IN A -> forwarding to 10.0.0.53
08:02:30 response: 172.16.5.21 (21ms)

cli_outputs.output:
Forwarder zone: corp.local
  Forward-to: 10.0.0.53 (dns-corp-01)
  Status: NO RESPONSE (last 47 attempts)
  Note: 10.0.0.53 was reassigned to dns-corp-02 during last week's datacenter migration; old dns-corp-01 host at 10.0.0.53 was decommissioned 2026-07-10.

Forwarder zone: corp.local
  Forward-to: 10.0.0.60 (dns-corp-02)
  Status: HEALTHY

monitoring.notes: Grafana shows dns-chi-01 forwarder success rate steady at 100%. dns-chi-02 forwarder success rate dropped to 0% at 2026-07-10 09:15, coinciding with the datacenter migration decommission window. Chicago clients round-robin between the two resolvers, so roughly a third of queries hit the failing dns-chi-02 (client retry behavior makes it feel like ~1 in 3).

hints: Compare the forwarder configuration on dns-chi-01 (working) against dns-chi-02 (failing) — they should point to the same upstream.
Check the CLI output note on dns-chi-02 about the datacenter migration — what happened to the old dns-corp-01 address?
dns-chi-02 is still forwarding to the decommissioned 10.0.0.53 instead of the new dns-corp-02 at 10.0.0.60.

solution.root_cause: dns-chi-02's forwarder still points to the decommissioned dns-corp-01 address (10.0.0.53) after last week's datacenter migration, while dns-chi-01 was updated to the new dns-corp-02 address (10.0.0.60). Since clients round-robin between the two resolvers, roughly a third of queries hit the stale forwarder and time out.
solution.fix: Update dns-chi-02's forwarder for the corp.local zone to point to 10.0.0.60 (dns-corp-02), matching dns-chi-01.
